- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Fast Load Times | web.dev](https://web.dev/explore/fast) - Learn how to optimize web performance for faster load times.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [PageSpeed Insights](https://pagespeed.web.dev/) - Analyze and improve your website's performance with Google's PageSpeed Insights.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [JS Benchmark](https://jsbenchmark.com/) - Test and compare JavaScript performance across different browsers and devices.
